scripts.db:clear: docker-compose exec -T postgres psql -U postgres -d knowledge_hub -v ON_ERROR_STOP=1 -c "TRUNCATE TABLE knowledge_chunks, document_sources RESTART IDENTITY CASCADE;"
scripts.dev:up: docker-compose up -d postgres backend frontend mcp
scripts.backend:lint: uv run --with ruff ruff check backend mcp_server tests && uv run --with pylint pylint --disable=C0103,C0114,C0115,C0116,C0304,C0415,R0801,R0903,R0913,R0917,W0611,W0621,E0401,E1102 backend mcp_server
scripts.backend:quality: npm run backend:lint && npm run backend:test
scripts.quality: npm run backend:quality && npm run frontend:quality
